column16: you gain the following benefits: - You reduce the severity of physical damage by one threshold (Severe to Major
column18: Minor to None). - You add the current value of the Unstoppable Die to your damage roll. - You can''t be Restrained or Vulnerable. Tip: If your Unstoppable Die is a d4 and the 4 is currently facing up
column19: you remove the die the next time you would increase it. However
column20: if your Unstoppable Die has increased to a d6 and the 4 is currently facing up
column21: you''ll turn it to 5 the next time you would increase it. In this case
column22: you''ll remove the die after you would need to increase it higher than 6.')
